explicit_limitations: Section 8 and Section 12 coverage is dated to cited GAO products; full bodies are not yet deconstructed.
FY2025 total exists in three official constructions: $326.38B, $367.71B, and $401B; D-0022 quarantines the historical-growth passage.
The approximately $37B EHRM figure is hearing-provided or press-reported pending hearing-record capture; GAO had not received it.
The staffing-dispute quotation is press-mediated; no primary VA document exists.
Chronicity of FY2025 material weaknesses remains undetermined.
Deferred branches remain for joint VA-DoW accounts and the education-data outage.
July 2026 currency watches may supersede dated claims, including the EHR 30% withhold deadline and Dole Act suicide report.
Volume II is a validated claim set, not the full 20-section charter; sections 4, 13, 14, and 17 remain in construction.
